cover_entities.title: Covers & Device
cover_entities.description: Select the cover entities this instance will control.

data_description.group: Seleccionar entidades para controlar vía la integración
data_description.linked_device_id: Select a physical device to merge this integration's entities into. The integration's sensors, switches, and buttons will appear directly under that device in Home Assistant. Select 'None (standalone device)' to revert to a separate virtual Adaptive Cover device. Only devices that own the selected cover entities are shown.

geometry.title: Cover Geometry
geometry.description: Configure cover dimensions. These measurements are used to calculate sun blocking position.

data_description.window_height: Indicar la altura de la ventana en metros
data_description.distance_shaded_area: Distancia de la persiana al área sombreada en metros
data_description.window_depth: Depth of window reveal/frame from wall surface (meters). Optional parameter for advanced accuracy. Set to 0 (default) to disable. Typical values: Flush mount = 0.05m (2in), Standard frame = 0.10m (4in), Deep reveal = 0.15m (6in). Window depth provides additional sun blocking at angled sun positions. Measure from the outer wall surface to the inner edge of the window frame. Only affects calculation at angles >10°.
data_description.sill_height: Height from the floor to the bottom of your window (in meters). Set to 0 (default) for floor-level windows or when unknown. For a window with its bottom edge 1 meter above the floor, set this to 1.0. This improves calculation accuracy for raised windows — without it, the blind closes slightly more than necessary. Range: 0.0–3.0m. Measure from the floor to the bottom edge of the glass area (the sill). Note: h_win (window height) is still measured from bottom to top of glass — these are independent measurements.
data_description.angle: Ángulo del toldo fijado medido perpendicularmente desde la pared hasta el suelo
data_description.slat_depth: Profundidad de cada lama individual en centímetros
data_description.slat_distance: Distancia vertical entre dos lamas en centímetros

sun_tracking.title: Sun Tracking
sun_tracking.description: Configure window orientation and sun tracking angles.

data_description.fov_left: Ángulo de visión hacia la izquierda del centro de la ventana
data_description.fov_right: Ángulo de visión hacia la derecha del centro de la ventana
data_description.min_elevation: Track sun only when elevation is ABOVE this angle (degrees above horizon). Sun elevation: 0°=horizon, 45°=halfway to zenith, 90°=directly overhead. Use this to ignore sun at certain times. Example: Set to 15° to ignore low morning/evening sun. Leave empty to track sun at all elevations.
data_description.max_elevation: Track sun only when elevation is BELOW this angle (degrees above horizon). Sun elevation: 0°=horizon, 45°=halfway to zenith, 90°=directly overhead. Use this to ignore sun at certain times. Example: Set to 60° to ignore high midday sun. Leave empty to track sun at all elevations.
data_description.blind_spot: Enable if you have obstacles blocking sun in part of the tracking area (trees, nearby buildings, roof overhang, balcony). When enabled, you define an azimuth + elevation range where sun is blocked. Cover ignores sun position when it's in this 'blind spot'. Leave disabled if you have clear view to sun all day.

position.title: Position Settings
position.description: Configure cover position limits, defaults, and sunset behavior.

data.enable_max_position: Forzar la posición máxima solo si el sol está enfrente de la ventana
data.enable_min_position: Forzar la posición mínima solo si el sol está enfrente de la ventana
data.inverse_state: Invertir el estado (se necesita para algunas persianas que no siguen las directrices de HA)
data.interp: Enable Position Calibration (custom open/close position mapping)

data_description.default_percentage: Posición por defecto de la persiana como porcentaje
data_description.max_position: Posición máxima ajustable de la persiana como porcentaje
data_description.enable_max_position: Controls WHEN maximum position limit applies. UNCHECKED (default, recommended): Maximum position applies ALL THE TIME - during sun tracking, default position, climate modes, etc. Cover never goes above max value. CHECKED (advanced): Maximum position ONLY applies when sun is directly in front of window. During default/fallback states, cover can go above max value. Most users should leave this UNCHECKED for consistent protection.
data_description.min_position: Posición mínima ajustable de la persiana como porcentaje
data_description.enable_min_position: Controls WHEN minimum position limit applies. UNCHECKED (default, recommended): Minimum position applies ALL THE TIME - during sun tracking, default position, climate modes, etc. Cover never goes below min value. CHECKED (advanced): Minimum position ONLY applies when sun is directly in front of window. During default/fallback states, cover can go below min value. Most users should leave this UNCHECKED for consistent protection.
data_description.sunset_position: Posición a la que cambiar tras el Ocaso
data_description.sunset_offset: Desfase (±) desde el Ocaso en minutos
data_description.sunrise_offset: Desfase (±) desde el Orto en minutos
data_description.open_close_threshold: Position threshold for covers that only support open/close commands (not position control). When the calculated position is greater than or equal to this threshold, the cover opens; when below, it closes. Default: 50% (opens at midpoint or above). Higher values (60-70%) keep cover closed more often, lower values (30-40%) open more often. Only affects covers without position support - covers with position control ignore this setting and use exact calculated positions.
data_description.inverse_state: Enable for covers where position logic is reversed. Standard: 0 = closed/lowered, 100 = open/raised. Inverted: 0 = open/raised, 100 = closed/lowered. Check this ONLY if your cover shows opposite behavior, 100% closes instead of opens, or documentation says 'inverted' or 'reversed'. Test your cover manually first to confirm. Most covers don't need this.
data_description.interp: Enable custom position mapping to calibrate covers that don't respond linearly to 0–100% commands. When enabled, a "Position Calibration" section will appear in the options menu (under Position Settings) where you can configure the mapping values. Use cases: cover doesn't move linearly, prefer certain ranges (more closed or more open), calibrate for unusual cover behavior. Leave disabled for normal operation.

data.delta_time: Intervalo mínimo entre cambios de posición
data.start_entity: Entidad para la hora de comienzo
data.end_entity: Entidad para la hora de finalización
data.return_sunset: When the operational end time is reached, send covers to the current effective default position (which will be the sunset position if astronomical sunset has already occurred, otherwise the normal default). Useful when your end time is before sunset and you want covers positioned correctly for the evening.

data_description.delta_position: Cambio mínimo de la posición requerido antes de aplicar cambios en la persiana
data_description.delta_time: Intervalo mínimo de tiempo requerido entre cambios de posición; mínimo 2 minutos
data_description.start_time: Hora de inicio para cada día; antes de esta hora, la persiana permanecerá estacionaria
data_description.start_entity: Entidad que representa la hora de inicio, anulando lo hora de inicio configurada arriba. Útil para automatizar la hora de inicio con una entidad
data_description.end_time: Hora de finalización diaria; despues de esta hora, la persiana permanecerá estacionaria
data_description.end_entity: Entidad que representa la hora de finalización, anulando lo hora de finalización configurada arriba. Útil para automatizar la hora de finalización con una entidad
data_description.return_sunset: When the operational end time is reached, send covers to the current effective default position (which will be the sunset position if astronomical sunset has already occurred, otherwise the normal default). Useful when your end time is before sunset and you want covers positioned correctly for the evening.

automation.title: Modificar la configuración de automatización
automation.description: Configure automation timing, position change thresholds, and active hours for automatic control.

manual_override.title: Manual Override
manual_override.description: Configure how manual position changes interact with automatic control.

data.manual_override_reset: Duración del reseteo de la anulación manual
data.manual_ignore_intermediate: Ignora las posiciones intermedias durante la anulación manual (apertura y cierre)

data_description.manual_override_duration: Duración del control manual antes de volver a control automático
data_description.manual_override_reset: Opción para resetear la duración de la anulación manual después de cada ajuste manual; si se deshabilita, la duración solo se aplica al primer ajuste manual
data_description.manual_threshold: Position difference (%) that counts as 'manual override' (default: 1%). If you manually move cover by this amount, override detection triggers. Typical values: 1-2% (sensitive, detects small adjustments), 5% (less sensitive, recommended), 10% (only large manual changes count). Prevents accidental override detection from small motor drifts or position reporting variations.
data_description.manual_ignore_intermediate: Ignore intermediate positions during manual opening and closing operations. Enable this to prevent override detection from transitional positions while the cover is moving to your target position. Useful if your cover reports many intermediate values during movement.

force_override.title: Force Override
force_override.description: Configure binary sensors that unconditionally override automatic control and move covers to a fixed position.

data_description.force_override_sensors: Binary sensors that override automatic control and move covers to the configured position when active. When ANY selected sensor is 'on', ALL covers move to the configured position regardless of any other settings. Manual control still works. Leave empty to disable this feature.
data_description.force_override_position: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when force override sensors are active. 0% = fully closed/retracted, 100% = fully open. Default: 0%.

custom_position.title: Custom Positions
custom_position.description: Configure binary sensors that set the cover to specific positions when active. Each sensor has its own target position — the first active sensor (in order 1→4) determines the position. If all sensors are off, this step is skipped and lower-priority rules apply. Use Home Assistant automations to toggle these sensors for scene-based or schedule-based cover control.

data_description.custom_position_sensor_1: Binary sensor that, when 'on', moves the cover to its configured position. Sensors are evaluated in order (1→4) — the first active sensor wins. Leave empty to skip this slot.
data_description.custom_position_1: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when Sensor 1 is active. 0% = closed (blinds lowered / awning retracted), 100% = open (blinds raised / awning extended). Default: 0%.
data_description.custom_position_sensor_2: Binary sensor for slot 2. Leave empty to skip.
data_description.custom_position_2: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when Sensor 2 is active. 0% = closed (blinds lowered / awning retracted), 100% = open (blinds raised / awning extended). Default: 0%.
data_description.custom_position_sensor_3: Binary sensor for slot 3. Leave empty to skip.
data_description.custom_position_3: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when Sensor 3 is active. 0% = closed (blinds lowered / awning retracted), 100% = open (blinds raised / awning extended). Default: 0%.
data_description.custom_position_sensor_4: Binary sensor for slot 4. Leave empty to skip.
data_description.custom_position_4: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when Sensor 4 is active. 0% = closed (blinds lowered / awning retracted), 100% = open (blinds raised / awning extended). Default: 0%.

motion_override.title: Motion Override
motion_override.description: Configure motion and occupancy sensors for presence-based automatic control.

data_description.motion_sensors: Binary sensors that enable/disable automatic sun positioning based on occupancy. When ANY sensor detects motion, covers use automatic sun-based positioning. When ALL sensors show no motion for the timeout duration, covers return to default position. Leave empty to disable this feature.
data_description.motion_timeout: Duration (in seconds) to wait after last motion before returning covers to default position. Prevents rapid position changes when motion sensors toggle frequently. Range: 30-3600 seconds (0.5-60 minutes). Default: 300 seconds (5 minutes).

data.outside_threshold: Temperatura exterior mínima para el modo verano

data_description.presence_entity: Entidad que representa el estado de presencia en la habitación o en el hogar
data_description.weather_entity: Monitorea las condiciones climáticas y la temperatura exterior.
data_description.outside_temp: Anula la temperatura exterior de la entidad meteorológica si ambas están configuradas
data_description.transparent_blind: La persiana es transparente y siempre debe cerrarse completamente cuando el modo verano esté activo.
data_description.lux_entity: Utilice el sensor de lux para determinar si la persiana debe reducir el deslumbramiento en el modo de presencia
data_description.lux_threshold: Umbral para el sensor de lux, por encima de este valor se debe reducir el deslumbramiento
data_description.irradiance_entity: Utilice el sensor de irradiancia para determinar si la cubierta debe reducir el deslumbramiento en el modo de presencia
data_description.irradiance_threshold: Umbral para el sensor de irradiancia, por encima de este valor se debe reducir el deslumbramiento

climate.description: Añadir variables de configuración climática adicionales.
climate.title: Editar configuración climática

data_description.weather_state: Seleccione las condiciones climáticas que permitan el control automático de las ventanas.

data_description.blind_spot_elevation: Cualquier valor igual o inferior se considera dentro del punto ciego. Resulta útil si el sol puede iluminar el objeto en el punto ciego.

blind_spot.title: Blind Spot
blind_spot.description: Configurar el punto ciego para la persiana. Estos valores son grados relativos al ancho del campo de visión. Donde 0 es la posición más a la izquierda, tomada del parámetro Campo de visión izquierdo.

data_description.interp_list: Lista de valores de interpolación, donde 0 es completamente cerrado y 100 es completamente abierto
data_description.interp_list_new: Rango personalizado de valores de interpolación, donde el inicio debe representar cerrado y el final abierto

interp.title: Position Calibration
interp.description:
Ajuste los valores a los que la cubierta se abre o cierra eficazmente. Ideal para cubiertas que no abren completamente al 0 % ni cierran al 100 %. 
 Los dos primeros controles deslizantes son para un ajuste de 2 puntos, las opciones de lista son para un ajuste de varios puntos

duplicate_select.title: Duplicate Cover — Select Source
duplicate_select.description: Choose which existing cover to duplicate settings from.

duplicate_configure.title: Duplicate Cover — Configure
duplicate_configure.description: Enter the unique settings for the new cover. All other settings will be copied from the source.

abort.source_not_found: The source cover no longer exists.

data.delta_time: Intervalo mínimo entre cambios de posición
data.start_entity: Entidad que indica la hora de inicio
data.end_entity: Entidad que indica la hora de finalización
data.return_sunset: When the operational end time is reached, send covers to the current effective default position (which will be the sunset position if astronomical sunset has already occurred, otherwise the normal default). Useful when your end time is before sunset and you want covers positioned correctly for the evening.

data_description.delta_position: Se requiere un cambio mínimo de posición antes de ajustar la posición de la persiana.
data_description.delta_time: Intervalo de tiempo mínimo entre cambios de posición; el mínimo es de 2 minutos
data_description.start_time: Hora de inicio de cada día; antes de esta hora, la cubierta permanecerá fija.
data_description.start_entity: Entidad que representa el estado de la hora de inicio, que anula la hora de inicio fija establecida anteriormente. Útil para automatizar la hora de inicio con una entidad.
data_description.end_time: Hora de finalización de cada día; después de esta hora, la cubierta permanecerá fija.
data_description.end_entity: Asegúrese de que la posición se ajuste a la configuración predeterminada del Ocaso antes de la hora de finalización. Esto es especialmente beneficioso cuando la hora de finalización precede a la del Ocaso real.
data_description.return_sunset: When the operational end time is reached, send covers to the current effective default position (which will be the sunset position if astronomical sunset has already occurred, otherwise the normal default). Useful when your end time is before sunset and you want covers positioned correctly for the evening.

automation.description: Configure automation timing, position change thresholds, and active hours for automatic control.

sun_tracking.title: Sun Tracking
sun_tracking.description: Configure window orientation and sun tracking angles.

data_description.fov_left: Ángulo del campo de visión a la izquierda del centro de la ventana
data_description.fov_right: Ángulo del campo de visión a la derecha del centro de la ventana
data_description.min_elevation: Track sun only when elevation is ABOVE this angle (degrees above horizon). Sun elevation: 0°=horizon, 45°=halfway to zenith, 90°=directly overhead. position.title: Position Settings
position.description: Configure cover position limits, defaults, and sunset behavior.

data.enable_max_position: Forzar la posición máxima solo cuando el sol esté frente a la ventana
data.enable_min_position: Sólo fuerce la posición máxima cuando el sol esté frente a la ventana
data.inverse_state: Invertir el estado (necesario para algunas cubiertas que no siguen las pautas de HA)
data.interp: Establezca posiciones de apertura y cierre personalizadas para My Cover, si no funciona completamente al 0-100 %

data_description.default_percentage: Posición por defecto de la persiana como porcentaje
data_description.max_position: Posición máxima ajustable de la persiana como porcentaje
data_description.enable_max_position: Controls WHEN maximum position limit applies. UNCHECKED (default, recommended): Maximum position applies ALL THE TIME - during sun tracking, default position, climate modes, etc. Cover never goes above max value. CHECKED (advanced): Maximum position ONLY applies when sun is directly in front of window. During default/fallback states, cover can go above max value. data_description.min_position: Posición mínima de la cubierta ajustable como porcentaje

UNCHECKED (default, recommended): Minimum position applies ALL THE TIME - during sun tracking, default position, climate modes, etc. Cover never goes below min value. CHECKED (advanced): Minimum position ONLY applies when sun is directly in front of window. During default/fallback states, cover can go below min value. data_description.sunrise_offset: Desfase (±) respecto del Orto en minutos

Higher values (60-70%) keep cover closed more often, lower values (30-40%) open more often. Use cases: cover doesn't move linearly, prefer certain ranges (more closed or more open), calibrate for unusual cover behavior. Leave disabled for normal operation.

manual_override.description: Configure how manual position changes interact with automatic control.

data.manual_override_reset: Restablecer la duración de la anulación manual
data.manual_ignore_intermediate: Ignorar posiciones intermedias durante la anulación manual (apertura y cierre)

data_description.manual_override_duration: La duración del control manual antes de restablecer el control automático
data_description.manual_override_reset: Opción para restablecer la duración de la anulación manual después de cada ajuste manual; si está deshabilitada, la duración solo se aplica al primer ajuste manual
data_description.manual_threshold: Position difference (%) that counts as 'manual override' (default: 1%). If you manually move cover by this amount, override detection triggers. Prevents accidental override detection from small motor drifts or position reporting variations.

data_description.force_override_position: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when force override sensors are active. 0% = fully closed/retracted, 100% = fully open. Default: 0%.

Use Home Assistant automations to toggle these sensors for scene-based or schedule-based cover control.

data_description.custom_position_1: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when Sensor 1 is active. 0% = closed (blinds lowered / awning retracted), 100% = open (blinds raised / awning extended). Default: 0%.
data_description.custom_position_sensor_2: Binary sensor for slot 2. Leave empty to skip.
data_description.custom_position_2: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when Sensor 2 is active. 0% = closed (blinds lowered / awning retracted), 100% = open (blinds raised / awning extended). Default: 0%.

data_description.custom_position_sensor_4: Binary sensor for slot 4. Leave empty to skip.
data_description.custom_position_4: Position (0-100%) to move covers to when Sensor 4 is active. 0% = closed (blinds lowered / awning retracted), 100% = open (blinds raised / awning extended). Default: 0%.

climate.description: Añadir variables de configuración climática adicionales.

data_description.weather_state: Elija las Condiciones climáticas que permitan el control automático de ventanas.

data_description.blind_spot_elevation: Cualquier valor igual o inferior se considera dentro del punto ciego. Resulta útil si el sol puede iluminar el objeto en el punto ciego.

blind_spot.title: Blind Spot
blind_spot.description: Configure el punto ciego para la persiana. Estos valores son grados relativos al ancho del campo de visión. Donde 0 es la posición más a la izquierda, tomada del parámetro Campo de visión izquierdo.

data_description.interp_list: Lista de valores de interpolación, donde 0 está completamente cerrado y 100 está completamente abierto

interp.title: Position Calibration
interp.description: Ajuste los valores con los que la persiana se abre o cierra. Ideal para persianas que no se abren completamente al 0 % ni se cierran al 100 %. Los dos primeros controles deslizantes son para un ajuste de 2 puntos; las opciones de lista son para un ajuste de varios puntos.

sync.title: Copy Settings to Other Covers
sync.description:
Choose which covers to copy settings to and which categories to sync. Only selected categories will be overwritten on target covers.

⚠️ Azimuth is always excluded — each cover keeps its own window orientation.

sync_confirm.title: Copy Settings — Confirm

abort.no_covers_to_sync: No other covers of the same type exist to sync to.
abort.no_targets_selected: No covers were selected to sync to.
